changeSet.author: system
system
system
system
system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS oos_containment ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, oos_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES oos_cases(id), hold_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, hold_type VARCHAR(40), hold_target VARCHAR(40), target_reference VARCHAR(200), hold_reason TEXT, hold_applied_at TIMESTAMPTZ, hold_applied_by BIGINT, hold_released_at TIMESTAMPTZ, hold_released_by BIGINT, immediate_actions TEXT, notification_issued BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, regulatory_notification_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, customer_notification_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, notes TEXT, containment_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_by BIGINT, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, UNIQUE(oos_id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_oos_containment_oos_id ON oos_containment(oos_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS oos_investigation_items ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, oos_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES oos_cases(id), item_type VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, item_number INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, description TEXT NOT NULL, finding TEXT, source VARCHAR(200), evidence_ref VARCHAR(400), performed_by_id BIGINT, performed_date TIMESTAMPTZ, item_status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_oos_inv_items_oos_id ON oos_investigation_items(oos_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS oos_retest_resample ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, oos_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES oos_cases(id), test_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, test_number INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, ordered_by_id BIGINT, ordered_date TIMESTAMPTZ, rationale TEXT, sample_reference VARCHAR(200), analyst_id BIGINT, performed_date TIMESTAMPTZ, result VARCHAR(200), result_pass BOOLEAN, equipment_used VARCHAR(200), analyst_comments TEXT, reviewer_id BIGINT, reviewed_date TIMESTAMPTZ, test_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_oos_retest_oos_id ON oos_retest_resample(oos_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS oos_impact_assessment ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, oos_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES oos_cases(id), scope_of_impact TEXT, batches_potentially_affected TEXT, products_potentially_affected TEXT, released_product_impact BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, customer_impact BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, regulatory_impact BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, patient_safety_risk VARCHAR(20), risk_justification TEXT, quarantine_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, recall_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, authority_notification_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, authority_notified_at TIMESTAMPTZ, authority_notified_by BIGINT, assessed_by_id BIGINT, assessed_date TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_by BIGINT, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, UNIQUE(oos_id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_oos_impact_oos_id ON oos_impact_assessment(oos_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS oos_root_cause ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, oos_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES oos_cases(id), root_cause_category VARCHAR(40), root_cause_description TEXT, root_cause_method VARCHAR(40), contributing_factors TEXT, immediate_cause TEXT, systematic_issue BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, recurrence_prevention TEXT, assessed_by_id BIGINT, assessed_date TIMESTAMPTZ, reviewed_by_id BIGINT, reviewed_date TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_by BIGINT, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, UNIQUE(oos_id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_oos_root_cause_oos_id ON oos_root_cause(oos_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS oos_linked_records ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, oos_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES oos_cases(id), linked_record_type VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, linked_record_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, linked_record_reference VARCHAR(200), linked_record_title VARCHAR(400), linked_record_status VARCHAR(100), relationship_type VARCHAR(40), notes TEXT, added_by BIGINT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_oos_linked_oos_id ON oos_linked_records(oos_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS oos_evidence ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, oos_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES oos_cases(id), evidence_type VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, evidence_number INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, title VARCHAR(400) NOT NULL, description TEXT, file_name VARCHAR(400), file_size BIGINT, content_type VARCHAR(200), storage_key VARCHAR(800), attachment_id BIGINT, submitted_by BIGINT, submitted_date TIMESTAMPTZ, evidence_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING_REVIEW', reviewed_by BIGINT, reviewed_date TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_oos_evidence_oos_id ON oos_evidence(oos_id);

changeSet.author: system
